message:
fix: reorder Close() to match spec shutdown sequence (GAP-8.23, GAP-8.24)

The spec (Appendix B) requires: cancel LLM → kill processes → emit
SESSION_END → close subagents → transition CLOSED. Close() was emitting
SESSION_END before killing processes and transitioning to CLOSED first.

Reorder so env.Cleanup() runs before SESSION_END, and state transitions
to CLOSED last. Replace the state-based re-entrancy guard with sync.Once
to prevent double-close panics while keeping the deferred state transition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
